summary: Joel Spolsky announces Stack Overflow Podcast episode 25, featuring guest Steve Yegge. The episode covers working at Google, marketing ideas, and programming languages. Joel notes the episode ran long in homage to Yegge's famously lengthy blog posts. He also describes fixing persistent Skype audio quality issues with new podcasting equipment.
key_points: Steve Yegge appeared as a guest to discuss Google, idea marketing, and programming languages
The episode intentionally ran 15 minutes long as a nod to Yegge's verbose blogging style
Joel invested in new podcasting gear to fix recurring Skype audio dropout problems
money_quotes: In the spirit of Steve's extremely long blog posts, we ran about 15 minutes long this week.
key_insight: This is a brief promotional post for a podcast episode with Steve Yegge, offering little substantive argument beyond announcing the guest and noting audio equipment improvements.
